message:
test(cli): add ensemble compare command tests

Add test coverage for ensemble compare subcommand:
- ensemble_compare_test.go: Unit tests for comparison CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 	switch format {

+			GeneratedAt: output.Timestamp().Format(time.RFC3339),

 			Summary:     result.Summary,
